smapsActiveEntity.msgText: 081118Z APR 26 NAVAREA IV 328/26. NORTH ATLANTIC. FRENCH GUIANA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 131030Z TO 131430Z APR IN AREA WITHIN THREE MILES OF 04-56.00N 052-05.00W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 131530Z APR 26.

072031Z APR 26 NAVAREA IV 327/26. NORTH ATLANTIC. GUYANA. 1. SURVEY OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL 30 MAY BY M/V GILLIGAN ISLAND IN AREA BOUND BY 06-57.13N 057-53.11W, 06-56.57N 057-51.56W, 06-43.01N 057-56.23W, 06-43.99N 057-57.71W. WIDE BERTH REQUESTED. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 310001Z MAY 26.

072013Z APR 26 NAVAREA IV 326/26. 1. NORTH AMERICAN ICE SERVICE (NAIS) ICEBERG BULLETIN 080001Z APR. 2. WARNING! THE INTERNATIONAL ICE PATROL IS EXPERIENCING REDUCED ICEBERG RECONNAISSANCE. ALL ICEBERG LIMITS REPORTED BELOW ARE ESTIMATED. PLEASE NAVIGATE WITH CAUTION. 3. ICEBERG LIMIT ALONG TRACKLINE JOINING 46-55N 054-00W, 45-35N 052-45W, 45-45N 046-55W, 46-40N 043-55W, 50-00N 045-00W, 53-05N 047-55W, 59-00N 056-00W. 4. ESTIMATED ICEBERG LIMIT ALONG TRACKLINE JOINING 59-00N 056-00W, 60-15N 052-45W, 57-35N 047-35W, 57-15N 041-50W, 58-10N 039-15W, 63-40N 034-20W, 65-00N 028-00W. 5. WESTERN ICEBERG LIMIT ALONG TRACKLINE JOINING 51-40N 056-55W, 51-15N 056-40W. 6. SEA ICE LIMIT ALONG TRACKLINES JOINING: A. 45-20N 060-59W, 45-30N 059-00W, 46-30N 058-30W, 47-35N 059-11W. B. 47-17N 052-46W, 47-11N 048-00W, 51-19N 048-24W, 57-23N 056-04W, 59-59N 058-00W, 62-00N 056-05W. C. 62-25N 040-41W, 59-28N 043-23W, 59-22N 043-43W, 59-45N 045-25W, 59-54N 044-29W. 7. MOST RECENT RECONNAISSANCE: SOUTHERN LIMIT SATELLITE PASS 06 APR 26. 8. REPORT POSITION AND TIME OF ANY ICEBERGS SEA ICE OR STATIONARY RADAR TARGETS THAT MAY LIKELY BE ICE TO THE NEAREST CANADIAN COAST GUARD MARINE COMMUNICATIONS AND TRAFFIC SERVICE STATION OR USING INMARSAT CODE 42. 9. FOR MORE REPORTING INFORMATION OR TO DOWNLOAD SHAPEFILES AND WEEKLY PREDICTIONS, GO TO WWW.NAVCEN.USCG.GOV/INTERNATIONAL-ICE-PATROL. 10. CANCEL THIS MSG 090001Z APR 26.

271824Z MAR 26 NAVAREA IV 323/26. NORTH ATLANTIC. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS, ROCKET LAUNCHING 0335Z TO 0738Z DAILY 09 APR THRU 09 MAY IN AREAS BOUND BY: A. 09-10.00N 050-54.00W, 09-09.00N 050-49.00W, 08-19.00N 051-14.00W, 08-21.00N 051-18.00W. B. 21-17.00N 046-08.00W, 21-11.00N 045-54.00W, 18-09.00N 047-16.00W, 18-15.00N 047-30.00W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 090838Z MAY 26.

040219Z APR 26 NAVAREA IV 314/26. NORTH ATLANTIC. FRENCH GUIANA. 1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS, SPACE DEBRIS 0425Z TO 0738Z DAILY 09 APR THRU 09 MAY IN AREA BOUND BY 05-23.46N 052-53.80W, 05-50.55N 052-47.95W, 05-50.55N 052-41.80W, 05-12.60N 052-40.98W. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 090838Z MAY 26.

031931Z APR 26 NAVAREA IV 313/26. NORTH ATLANTIC. 1. CABLE OPERATIONS 080001Z TO 302200Z APR BY CABLESHIP ILE DE MOLENE IN AREA BOUND BY 41-58.70N 038-55.40W, 42-13.10N 039-03.80W, 41-54.60N 040-09.70W, 41-40.20N 040-01.10W. WIDE BERTH REQUESTED. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 302300Z APR 26.
021409Z APR 26 NAVAREA IV 306/26. WESTERN NORTH ATLANTIC. CUBA. CARAPACHIBEY LIGHT 021-26.90N 082-55.40W UNLIT.

281634Z MAR 26 NAVAREA IV 296/26. CARIBBEAN SEA. COLOMBIA. 1. SURVEY OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL 01 JUN BY M/V ARMADA 7807 IN AREA BOUND BY 11-31.85N 073-17.94W, 11-47.88N 073-32.28W, 11-39.81N 073-43.98W, 11-35.10N 073-47.28W, 11-28.81N 073-47.34W, 11-28.62N 073-41.40W, 11-28.64N 073-21.06W, 11-31.74N 073-17.17W. 280808Z MAR 26 NAVAREA IV 295/26. NORTH ATLANTIC. WEATHER MESSAGE SERVICES INTERRUPTED AT USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITIES: A. BOSTON 41-43.00N 070-31.00W. B. CHESAPEAKE 36-44.00N 076-01.00W. C. CHARLESTON 32-08.00N 081-42.00W. D. MIAMI 25-30.00N 080-23.00W. E. NEW ORLEANS 29-53.00N 089-57.00W. F. SAN JUAN 18-27.00N 066-06.00W.

262306Z MAR 26 NAVAREA IV 288/26. CARIBBEAN SEA. TRINIDAD AND TOBAGO. 1. SURVEY OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL 102200Z APR BY M/V GLADYS MC CALL TOWING 300 METER LONG CABLES ALONG TRACKLINE JOINING 10-44.33N 061-37.13W, 10-46.45N 061-41.46W, 10-48.43N 061-45.85W. 500 METER BERTH REQUESTED. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 102300Z APR 26.

231837Z MAR 26 NAVAREA IV 276/26. GULF OF AMERICA. TEXAS. 1. SURVEY OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL 15 JUN BY M/V OLYMPIC ARTEMIS, M/V SANCO SWIFT, M/V EAGLE EXPLORER, M/V ISLAND PRIDE AND M/V ARMADA 8603 IN AREA BOUND BY 27-53.36N 095-40.98W, 27-57.39N 093-30.08W, 26-28.57N 093-29.33W, 26-47.28N 095-39.87W. WIDE BERTH REQUESTED. 2. CANCEL NAVAREA IV 16/26. 3. CANCEL THIS MSG 160001Z JUN 26.
222026Z MAR 26 NAVAREA IV 275/26. NORTH ATLANTIC. FLORIDA. CANCEL NAVAREA IV 251/26 AND THIS MSG, OPERATIONS COMPLETED.

201158Z MAR 26 NAVAREA IV 264/26. NORTH ATLANTIC. 1. MF AND HF R/T AND DSC SERVICES UNRELIABLE 201330Z TO 201430Z MAR AT USCG REMOTE COMMUNICATION FACILITIES: A. BOSTON 41-43N 070-31W. B. 182140Z MAR 26 NAVAREA IV 258/26(24). NORTH ATLANTIC. 1. ODAS BUOY 3 ESTABLISHED UNTIL 30 APR IN 07-39.05N 056-20.20W. WIDE BERTH REQUESTED. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 010001Z MAY 26.

132104Z MAR 26 NAVAREA IV 239/26(24,25). NORTH ATLANTIC. 1. SURVEY OPERATIONS IN PROGRESS UNTIL 292200Z APR BY M/V AMAZON WARRIOR TOWING 10500 METER LONG CABLES ALONG TRACKLINE JOINING 10-18.83N 058-42.89W, 10-22.99N 058-43.73W, 11-16.06N 058-43.76W, 11-25.35N 058-39.44W, 11-36.31N 058-58.34W, 11-04.52N 059-08.66W, 10-35.97N 059-06.45W, 10-11.58N 059-00.15W. YUUM KAK NAAB 19-36.7N 092-17.9W. 2. TO REPORT A MOBILE OFFSHORE DRILLING UNIT AS PER IMO RESOLUTION A.1023(26), PARAGRAPH 11.5.1, CONTACT NAVSAFETY@NGA.MIL SUBJ: MODU REPORT. 3. 041331Z DEC 24 NAVAREA IV 1524/24(25). EASTERN CARIBBEAN SEA. ST. KITTS AND NEVIS. 1. SABA BANK HAS BEEN DESIGNATED AS AN IMO ADOPTED AREA TO BE AVOIDED (ATBA) AND PARTICULARLY SENSITIVE SEA AREA (PSSA). 2. TO AVOID THE RISK OF POLLUTION AND DAMAGE TO THE ENVIRONMENT, ENTRY IS PROHIBITED FOR VESSELS OF 300 GROSS TONS AND GREATER, AND ANCHORING IS PROHIBITED FOR ALL VESSELS, IN AREA BOUND BY 17-27.06N 063-56.14W, 17-29.00N 063-55.09W, 17-27.94N 063-43.32W, 17-38.03N 063-27.41W, 17-43.35N 063-32.74W, 17-45.98N 063-29.98W, 17-40.34N 063-21.10W, 17-30.88N 063-10.92W, 17-23.80N 063-11.25W, 17-16.27N 063-15.85W, 17-13.44N 063-26.89W, 17-10.55N 063-41.81W, 17-20.85N 063-49.89W. VESSELS VIOLATING THESE REGULATIONS WILL RECEIVE A FINE. 3. FOR FURTHER INFORMATION, CONTACT DUTCH CARRIBEAN COAST GUARD, PHONE: 599 9463 7620, 599 9510 0913, EMAIL: RCC.CURACAO@MINDEF.NL. 4. CANCEL NAVAREA IV 1518/24.
